title: ReviewMeeting
description: A monthly Public Design Commission meeting and its agenda. PDC meets once a month; a typical meeting is a morning Committee Meeting followed by a Public Meeting with a batch vote on Consent Items and any Public Hearings, held in the City Hall Board Room and livestreamed on YouTube. NO Open Data twin exists for the calendar/agenda — meetings, agendas, and minutes are published only as HTML/PDF on the site (design-review/meetings). This schema reverse-engineers the agenda so it could be queried; each agenda item references a DesignProject.

meetingId.description: Stable identifier for the meeting (e.g. yyyy-mm-dd).

kind.description: Which session — PDC typically runs a Committee Meeting in the morning and a Public Meeting (consent + hearings) after.

location.description: Meeting location — typically the PDC Board Room, 3rd floor, City Hall.
location.default: Public Design Commission Board Room, 3rd floor, City Hall

remote.description: Whether the meeting is also held/livestreamed remotely (Microsoft Teams videoconference; livestreamed on YouTube).

submissionDeadline.description: Digital submission deadline for this meeting cycle (materials due by 12:00pm on the deadline).

hardCopyDeadline.description: Hard-copy delivery deadline for approved projects (the Thursday after the meeting).

minutesUrl.description: URL of the published meeting minutes (PDF/HTML).

agendaItems.description: Ordered agenda items. Consent items are batch-voted; public-hearing items get full Commission review.

AgendaItem.description: One project on a meeting agenda, with its calendaring category and (after the meeting) its result.

title.description: Project title as listed on the agenda.
